creator: adam@blacktabby.org
text:
Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of www/amaya,
>
> Please note that PR ports/120006 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/120006
>
>   
Looks good to me. If the submitter would like to take maintainership, 
they're more than welcome to.

 -Adam
